dashboard.title: My Portfolio
dashboard.hello: Hello {{name}}. Here's the current state of your account.

settings.title: Account Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your profile, security, and platform preferences.

profile.title: Personal Information
profile.avatarHint: Supported formats: JPG, PNG or GIF. Max 2MB.

security.title: Security & Access
security.twofaDesc: Add an extra layer of security to prevent unauthorized access to your funds.
security.authAppDesc: Use Google Authenticator or Authy to generate unique access codes.
security.smsAuthDesc: Receive a code by text each time you try to withdraw assets from your wallet.

wallet.title: Wallet Configuration
wallet.web3Desc: Manage external wallets connected to your main account.
wallet.whitelistToggleDesc: Block any withdrawal to new addresses not saved in your book. (Requires 24h to deactivate this security rule).

notifications.title: Notification Center
notifications.priceAlertsDesc: We'll notify you if your assets change by 10%.
notifications.orderFillDesc: Instant visible confirmation when a trade on your account completes successfully.
notifications.transfersDesc: Receive required reports on incoming or outgoing transfers from your Wallet.
notifications.newsletterDesc: Receive the best market summary (Crypto & CEDEARs) every Sunday morning.

preferences.title: Display Preferences
preferences.currencyHint: All market values and wallet balances will be shown in this currency.
preferences.hideBalancesDesc: Keep all global balances blurred until you hover over them.
preferences.limitAnimationsDesc: Disable glow and bright colors to improve battery performance.

news.title: Crypto News
news.subtitle: Your information bridge on the blockchain.
news.noResults: We couldn't find news matching your search.

wallet.title: My Wallet
wallet.subtitle: Manage your balances, transactions and portfolio.

market.title: Global Market
market.subtitle: Real-time market prices for digital and traditional assets.
